headline: Xi to visit North Korea, reaffirming alliance amid global tensions
headline_zh: 习近平将访朝，重申中朝同盟关系
narrative: Xi Jinping's upcoming visit to North Korea, his first in seven years, dominates the day's agenda, signaling continuity in the Sino-DPRK relationship despite geopolitical shifts. Meanwhile, Gaokao dominates social discourse, with viral stories highlighting extreme difficulty polarization and student resilience. On the economic front, MOFCOM announced anti-dumping duties on POM imports from Korea, Thailand, and Malaysia, while new measures to boost inbound tourism via departure tax refunds were unveiled. The CSRC issued guidelines for private equity fund supervision, reflecting ongoing financial risk control efforts.
narrative_zh: 习近平即将访问朝鲜，这是七年来首次，表明中朝关系在 geopolitical 变化中保持延续。高考成为社会焦点，试题难度两极分化和考生心态的趣闻刷屏。经济方面，商务部对韩泰马共聚聚甲醛征收反倾销税，并推出离境退税措施促入境消费。证监会发布私募基金监管新规，金融风险防控持续推进。
market_snapshot: SSE Composite 4027.736 ▼0.74% · Shenzhen Component 15314.7 ▼2.21% · ChiNext 3957.935 ▼3.20% · USD/CNY 6.765 ▼0.12% · USD/CNH 6.7908 ▲0.26%
